title: clusia drouetiana
intro: Clusia drouetiana, also known as the Clusia tree or Clusia, is a species of plant in the Clusiaceae family, native to Central and South America. Clusia drouetiana has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with the roots and bark being used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Clusia drouetiana include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and exhibiting antioxidant properties, which can help protect the body from oxidative stress. Clusia drouetiana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and it's also used in traditional medicine in some parts of the world, including in Latin America and the Caribbean.
